title: Manchester United: Abnormal Price Strength in a Weak Market
text: Reports that the iconic soccer franchise is up for sale recently sent the stock soaring to 60% in a week. Since then, the stock has seen little in the way of sellers - a sign of abnormal strength.

title: Axon Enterprise: A Market Beating Stock With A Mission And A Moat
text: Axon Enterprise continues to perform at high levels in 2022 as it has raised guidance twice this year and nearly doubled returns in the last six months. Axon Enterprise has transformed from a hardware device company into the operating system for law enforcement.
